title: Dreath dreath-mod.json
description: JSON schema for dreath-mod files, which are used in Dreath modding.

discord.title: Discord Invite
discord.description: A discord server invite, which can also be a short '.gg/...' or just the invite itself.

class-path.title: Class Path
class-path.description: A Java class-path to a specific class/file.

min-version.title: Minimum Dependency Version
min-version.description: The minimum version of this dependency.

load.title: Load Order
load.description: When this dependency should be loaded in relation to this mod.

id.title: Mod ID
id.description: A mod ID for internal identification, which should be unique.

name.title: Mod Name
name.description: A mod name that will be displayed to the user.

version.title: Mod Version
version.description: The current version of your mod.

description.title: Mod Description
description.description: A short description of your mod and what it does.

main.title: Main Class
main.description: Class path to the mod's main class.

developers.title: Mod Developers
developers.description: List of developers who worked on this mod.

contact.title: Mod Contact Values
contact.description: All contact links related to this mod.

email.title: Contact/support Email
email.description: Email address for support regarding this mod.

source.title: Source
source.description: Link to this mod's source code. Usually GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket.

extra.title: Extra Links
extra.description: Additional links that are not one of the types above.

dependencies.title: Dependencies
dependencies.description: List of dependencies for this mod.

external.title: External Dependencies
external.description: List of external dependencies, which are also mods.
